title: Kuma Strikes Saturn
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Kizaru, Sanji, Unknown person #3 as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Pumped now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Prepare for a full-fleet bombard- ment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All Marines are to return to their vessels immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What just happened in the center of town?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hell if I know!! Just do as you're told!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SAINT SATURN!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Admiral Borsalino!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PLEASE HURRY BACK TO THE SHPS!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Kizaru and I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...shall remain on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Begin the Barrage as soon as possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What?! but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Go.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought you were only after my life!! Isn't that enough to end this madness?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why are you doing this, Saint Saturn?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The most cutting edge research of all the scientific fields can be found on Egghead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Destroying it will set us back an entire century! Please call off this buster call!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: KIZARU!! I'm BEGGING YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...you might still be hiding something.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perhaps something that could hinder the world government?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: either way, we have no need for further advance-ment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But what about humanity!!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
